name: Renato Floor Lamp - FLL4006 - Brass - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the elegance of the Renato floor lamp. Standing at 63.5 inches, this brass and iron masterpiece combines classic charm with modern appeal. The lamps sleek design and warm brass finish provide a refined look suitable for any decor. Whether placed in a living room, study, or bedroom, its gentle glow creates an inviting ambiance. The Renato floor lamp is more than a light source; it is a statement piece that enhances the style and comfort of your home. Experience sophistication and transform your interior with this exquisite brass addition.
